mapper.select: SELECT cs.id as service_id, cs.user_id, cs.game_id, cs.title, cs.description, cs.price, cs.unit, cs.rating, cs.order_count, cs.status, cs.create_time, cs.update_time, g.name as game_name, g.description as game_description, g.cover_image as game_cover_image, g.category as game_category, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.rating as user_rating FROM companion_service cs LEFT JOIN game g ON cs.game_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user u ON cs.user_id = u.id WHERE cs.id = #{serviceId}

SELECT cs.id as service_id, cs.user_id, cs.game_id, cs.title, cs.description, cs.price, cs.unit, cs.rating, cs.order_count, cs.status, cs.create_time, cs.update_time, g.name as game_name, g.description as game_description, g.cover_image as game_cover_image, g.category as game_category, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.rating as user_rating FROM companion_service cs LEFT JOIN game g ON cs.game_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user u ON cs.user_id = u.id WHERE cs.status = 1 ORDER BY cs.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT cs.id as service_id, cs.user_id, cs.game_id, cs.title, cs.description, cs.price, cs.unit, cs.rating, cs.order_count, cs.status, cs.create_time, cs.update_time, g.name as game_name, g.description as game_description, g.cover_image as game_cover_image, g.category as game_category, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.rating as user_rating FROM companion_service cs LEFT JOIN game g ON cs.game_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user u ON cs.user_id = u.id WHERE cs.game_id = #{gameId} AND cs.status = 1 ORDER BY cs.rating DESC, cs.order_count DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT cs.id as service_id, cs.user_id, cs.game_id, cs.title, cs.description, cs.price, cs.unit, cs.rating, cs.order_count, cs.status, cs.create_time, cs.update_time, g.name as game_name, g.description as game_description, g.cover_image as game_cover_image, g.category as game_category FROM companion_service cs LEFT JOIN game g ON cs.game_id = g.id WHERE cs.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status = 1 ORDER BY cs.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO companion_service (user_id, game_id, title, description, price, unit, rating, order_count, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{gameId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{unit}, #{rating}, #{orderCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE companion_service SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, unit = #{unit}, rating = #{rating}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{serviceId}
